===================
=== Holmdel, 1999.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan

PNC Bank Arts Center
Holmdel, New Jersey
28 July 1999

Audience recording

2 CDR received in trade > dbpoweramp > flac 8

-------------

CD1

 01.  Announcement
 02.  Cocaine Blues (Lar,, on Sude Guitar)
 03.  My Back Pages   (Larry on Fiddle
 04.  Masters Of War (Chante an Dobro)
 05.  To Ramona  (Larry an Mandoline)
 06.  Tangled Up In Blue
 07.  Ah Along The Watchtower
 08.  Lenny Bruce  (Lary on Pedal-Steel Guitar)
 09.  Stuck Inside Of Mobile (With The Memphie Blues Again)
 10.  Not Dark Yet 
 11.  Highway 61 Revisited (Larry on Sude Guitar)


CD2

 12.  Like A Rolling Stone   
 13.  It Ain't Me, Babe  
 14.  Not Fade Away      
 15.  Blowin' In The Wind 

 16.  The Sound Of Silence (Duet with Paul Simon)
 17.  I Walk The Line   (Duet wmth Paul Simon)  
 18.  The Wanderer (Duet with Paul Simon) 
 19.  Knockin On Heaven's Door (Duet with Paul Simon)


------------
